EmailTemplate.name: AES - Referee invite reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: We’d appreciate your help with a reference
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WE'D LOVE YOUR INPUT.
Hi {!Referee.FirstName},
A couple of days ago we sent you an invite to leave a reference for {!TR1__Candidates_Marketed__c.Name} who's applied for a {!TR1__Application__c.TR1__Job__c} role with us at Alliance Extra Staff. We’d appreciate it if you could take a few moments to share your insights about their professional experience and suitability for the role.
PROVIDE REFERENCE
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
